mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNEMPLYRINFO ( ESNTL_ID, EMPLYR_ID, USER_NM, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_HINT, PASSWORD_CNSR, IHIDNUM, SEXDSTN_CODE, ZIP, HOUSE_ADRES, AREA_NO, EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE, DETAIL_ADRES, HOUSE_END_TELNO, MBTLNUM, GROUP_ID, FXNUM, EMAIL_ADRES, HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO, SBSCRB_DE, CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM, ORGNZT_ID, OFCPS_NM, OFFM_TELNO, EMPL_NO, LOCK_AT, LOCK_CNT ) VALUES ( #{uniqId}, #{emplyrId}, #{emplyrNm}, #{password}, #{passwordHint}, #{passwordCnsr}, #{ihidnum}, #{sexdstnCode}, #{zip}, #{homeadres}, #{areaNo}, #{emplyrSttusCode}, #{detailAdres}, #{homeendTelno}, #{moblphonNo}, #{groupId}, #{fxnum}, #{emailAdres}, #{homemiddleTelno}, SYSDATETIME, SYSDATETIME, #{orgnztId}, #{ofcpsNm}, #{offmTelno}, #{emplNo}, #{lockAt}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT ESNTL_ID AS uniqId, 'USR03' AS userTy, EMPLYR_ID AS emplyrId, USER_NM AS emplyrNm, PASSWORD AS password, PASSWORD_HINT AS passwordHint, PASSWORD_CNSR AS passwordCnsr, IHIDNUM AS ihidnum, SEXDSTN_CODE AS sexdstnCode, ZIP AS zip, HOUSE_ADRES AS homeadres, AREA_NO AS areaNo, EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE AS emplyrSttusCode, DETAIL_ADRES AS detailAdres, HOUSE_END_TELNO AS homeendTelno, MBTLNUM AS moblphonNo, GROUP_ID AS groupId, FXNUM AS fxnum, EMAIL_ADRES AS emailAdres, HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO AS homemiddleTelno, TO_CHAR(SBSCRB_DE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sbscrbDe, LOCK_AT AS lockAt, ORGNZT_ID AS orgnztId, OFCPS_NM AS ofcpsNm, OFFM_TELNO AS offmTelno, EMPL_NO AS emplNo FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{value}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM COMTNEMPLYRINFO WHERE 1 = 1
AND EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = #{sbscrbSttus}
AND EMPLYR_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ( EMPLYR_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR EMAIL_ADRES LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR ORGNZT_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNEMPLYRINFO SET EMPLYR_ID = #{emplyrId}, USER_NM = #{emplyrNm}, PASSWORD_HINT = #{passwordHint}, PASSWORD_CNSR = #{passwordCnsr}, IHIDNUM = #{ihidnum}, SEXDSTN_CODE = #{sexdstnCode}, ZIP = #{zip}, HOUSE_ADRES = #{homeadres}, AREA_NO = #{areaNo}, EMPLYR_STTUS_CODE = #{emplyrSttusCode}, DETAIL_ADRES = #{detailAdres}, HOUSE_END_TELNO = #{homeendTelno}, MBTLNUM = #{moblphonNo}, GROUP_ID = #{groupId}, FXNUM = #{fxnum}, EMAIL_ADRES = #{emailAdres}, HOUSE_MIDDLE_TELNO = #{homemiddleTelno}, ORGNZT_ID = #{orgnztId}, OFCPS_NM = #{ofcpsNm}, OFFM_TELNO = #{offmTelno}, EMPL_NO = #{emplNo} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE COMTNEMPLYRINFO SET PASSWORD = #{password}, CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM = SYSDATETIME WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE COMTNEMPLYRINFO SET LOCK_AT = NULL, LOCK_CNT = NULL, LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NULL WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
